text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Glory, glory, ho! ♪ Good morning, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You bet I am! You know why? It's because I had
the most wonderful dream!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I dreamed that I was with Shiraoki on Mount Fuji
eating eggplant and watching the hawks fly!
That's all the ingredients needed for the most
powerful soup for the soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I'm well rested, well chuffed, and,
well, just happy to be here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think Shiraoki must have instilled me with the
power to do my best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think a good night's sleep probably played more
of a role than divine intervention... but either
way, I'm glad she's rested.
